case_title: RUXTON, MARGARET et al VS BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY RUXTON, MARGARET RUXTON, NEAL AS TO DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUXTON, MARGARET RUXTON, NEAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL OF PLTF'S CLAIM SENT TO MARGARET RUXTON RETURNED--UNCLAIMED
DEFENDANT SENT IN DEF'S CLAIM WITH $26.00 CHECK SENT OUT INFO RE:CERTFD.MAILSERVICE - SENT SCF#26 FORM.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,734.30 FILED BY BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RUXTON, MARGARET RUXTON, NEAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT RUXTON, MARGARET RUXTON, NEAL $1,214.30 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,240.30, NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFT. NEL RUXTON. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC.
